tasks.context:
## Spec Context
Add to site.json: {"github":{"username":"skitzo2000","pinned":[]}}. This goes at the top level alongside meta, about, social, skills, projects.

In site.ts, add:
```typescript
export interface GitHubConfig {
  username: string;
  pinned: string[];
}
```
And update SiteData to include `github?: GitHubConfig`.

## Current Structure
site.json has: meta, about, social, skills, projects
site.ts exports: SiteMeta, SocialLink, Project, SkillCategory, SiteData interfaces + getSiteData()

## Rules
- The word 'blog' must NEVER appear anywhere
- Do NOT add Co-Authored-By to git commits

No other new dependencies added

AC-4: marked is imported dynamically (import('marked')) only when README expansion is triggered.

## Rules

tasks.title: Create ProjectShowcase.astro component
tasks.description: Create the main ProjectShowcase.astro component that replaces the static Projects section. Includes: SSG-rendered static fallback cards, client-side GitHub API fetching with localStorage caching, carousel with auto-rotation/pause/manual controls, README modal with lazy-loaded marked, skeleton loading states, language color dots, relative time display, mobile responsive layout, and full theme/accessibility support.
acceptance_criteria: Component accepts props: projects (Project[]), githubUser (string), revealIndex (number)
Static fallback cards render from site.json projects at build time
Section has id='projects' for goto command
Cards use .card class for filter compatibility
Each card has data-filter-text attribute with name+description+language+topics
GitHub API fetched client-side from api.github.com/users/{user}/repos
Repos sorted by stars descending, then by pushed_at
localStorage cache with key 'skitz0-gh-repos' and 1-hour TTL
README cache per repo with key 'skitz0-gh-readme-{repo}' and 1-hour TTL
4 visible cards on desktop, 1-2 on mobile (<768px)
Auto-rotation every 8 seconds, pauses on hover
Previous/Next arrow buttons with keyboard accessibility
Continuous wrap (last → first)
Smooth slide transition (CSS transform)
Skeleton cards shown while fetching (animated pulse)
Click card opens README modal
marked loaded via dynamic import only on README expand
README modal has close button + Escape key dismiss
Code blocks in README styled with theme colors
README images displayed (GitHub raw URLs)
If README fetch fails, show 'README unavailable' with repo link
Loading spinner in modal while README fetches
Status indicator: 'Live from GitHub' / 'Cached' / hidden for static
All colors use CSS custom properties (no hardcoded colors except LANG_COLORS map)
prefers-reduced-motion: no auto-rotation, no slide transitions
ARIA labels on carousel controls
Screen reader announcements for rotation
No instances of the word 'blog'
Fallback: if API fails (403/network), static cards remain visible

verification.command: cd /home/skitz0/Projects/skitz0.com && test -f src/components/ProjectShowcase.astro && echo 'File exists' && ! grep -i 'blog' src/components/ProjectShowcase.astro && echo 'No blog word'

tasks.context:
## Architecture
Single Astro component with 3 sections: frontmatter (props/imports), HTML template, scoped <style>, processed <script>.

## HTML Template Structure
- <section id='projects'> wrapper with data-reveal
- <h2> section heading: '## # personal_projects' (matches existing)
- .showcase__viewport (overflow:hidden) > .showcase__track (flex row, translateX for sliding)
- Static cards inside track (rendered by Astro from projects prop)
- .showcase__nav with prev/next buttons
- .showcase__dots for page indicators
- .showcase__status for 'Live from GitHub' / 'Cached' indicator
- .showcase__modal (hidden) for README display
- .showcase__skeleton (hidden template, cloned by JS)

## Card Structure (must match for filter compatibility)
Each card uses class='card showcase__card' with:
- .card__label ('project.sh' for static, 'github.sh' for live)
- .card__title ('> repoName')
- .card__desc (description)
- .card__meta (language dot + star count + relative time)
- .card__tags (#topic1 #topic2 #topic3)
- .card__link ('$ cat learn_more.txt' → GitHub URL)
- data-filter-text='name description language topic1 topic2'
- data-repo='repoName' (for README fetch)

## Client JS Sections
1. Constants: API URL, cache keys, TTL, LANG_COLORS map
2. Cache: getRepoCache(), setRepoCache(), getReadmeCache(), setReadmeCache()
3. Fetcher: fetchRepos(), fetchReadme(repo)
4. Renderer: renderGitHubCards(repos), createCardElement(repo)
5. Carousel: currentPage, cardsPerPage, startRotation(), stopRotation(), slideTo(), next(), prev()
6. Modal: openReadme(repo), closeReadme(), renderMarkdown(md)
7. Utilities: timeAgo(date), getCardsPerPage()
8. Init: checkCache → fetch/render → startCarousel

## GitHub API
- Repos: GET https://api.github.com/users/skitzo2000/repos?sort=updated&per_page=100
- README: GET https://api.github.com/repos/skitzo2000/{repo}/readme (Accept: application/vnd.github.v3.raw)
- Unauthenticated, 60 req/hr limit

## Carousel Math
- cardsPerPage: 4 (desktop), 2 (<1024px), 1 (<768px)
- pageCount = Math.ceil(totalCards / cardsPerPage)
- offset = currentPage * 100 (% of viewport)
- track.style.transform = `translateX(-${offset}%)`
- Card width: calc((100% - gaps) / cardsPerPage)

## Existing Patterns to Follow
- CommandBar.astro: 617 lines, single file, processed <script>
- ProjectCard.astro: .card class, .card__title, .card__desc, .card__tags, .card__tag, .card__link
- CSS vars: --bg-card, --border, --accent, --fg-primary, --fg-secondary, --fg-muted, --accent-glow
- Reveal animation: data-reveal, data-reveal-index
- Font: var(--font-mono) for headings/labels, var(--font-sans) for body

## Security Rules
- No hardcoded colors (except LANG_COLORS constant which maps language names to hex codes)
- All user-facing text must not contain 'blog'
- README HTML from marked must be rendered safely (marked escapes by default)
- Do NOT add Co-Authored-By to git commits

tasks.title: Update index.astro to use ProjectShowcase
tasks.description: Replace the Projects component import and usage in index.astro with ProjectShowcase. Pass the projects array, githubUser from site.json, and revealIndex.
acceptance_criteria: index.astro imports ProjectShowcase instead of Projects
ProjectShowcase receives projects={site.projects}, githubUser={site.github?.username || 'skitzo2000'}, revealIndex={4}
Projects.astro import removed
No instances of the word 'blog'

verification.command: cd /home/skitz0/Projects/skitz0.com && grep -c 'ProjectShowcase' src/pages/index.astro && ! grep 'import Projects ' src/pages/index.astro && echo 'OK'

tasks.context:
## Current index.astro
```astro
---
import Projects from '../components/Projects.astro';
import { getSiteData } from '../data/site';
const site = getSiteData();
---
<Projects projects={site.projects} revealIndex={4} />
```

## Change To
```astro
---
import ProjectShowcase from '../components/ProjectShowcase.astro';
import { getSiteData } from '../data/site';
const site = getSiteData();
---
<ProjectShowcase projects={site.projects} githubUser={site.github?.username || 'skitzo2000'} revealIndex={4} />
```

Keep all other imports and components unchanged.

## Rules
- Do NOT add Co-Authored-By to git commits

verification.command: cd /home/skitz0/Projects/skitz0.com && npx astro build 2>&1 && echo 'BUILD OK' && grep -ri 'blog' src/ content/ --include='*.astro' --include='*.ts' --include='*.json' --include='*.css' | wc -l

tasks.context:
## Verification Steps
1. Run `npx astro build` — must exit 0
2. Check for 'blog' word: `grep -ri 'blog' src/ content/ --include='*.astro' --include='*.ts' --include='*.json' --include='*.css'` — must return 0 results
3. Check ProjectShowcase has id='projects': `grep 'id="projects"' src/components/ProjectShowcase.astro`
4. Check site.json: `node -e "const d=require('./content/site.json'); console.log(d.github.username)"` — must print 'skitzo2000'
5. Check marked: `node -e "const p=require('./package.json'); console.log(p.dependencies.marked)"` — must print version
6. Check index.astro: `grep 'ProjectShowcase' src/pages/index.astro` — must match
7. Check CommandBar filter: `grep 'data-filter-text' src/components/CommandBar.astro` — must match

If build fails, read the error output and fix the issue in the relevant file.

## Rules
- Do NOT add Co-Authored-By to git commits

tasks.title: Update CHANGELOG.md

acceptance_criteria: CHANGELOG.md [Unreleased] section updated with project showcase entries
Entries cover: GitHub API fetching, carousel, README modal, caching, skeleton states, fallback behavior, filter integration, marked dependency
No instances of the word 'blog'
Uses 'Added' and 'Changed' categories
tasks.context:
## CHANGELOG Format
Add under the existing [Unreleased] section. Current entries cover theme engine and command bar.

### Added
- GitHub-sourced project showcase replacing static project cards
- Client-side GitHub API fetching with localStorage caching (1-hour TTL)
- Auto-rotating project carousel (8-second interval, pause on hover)
- Previous/Next navigation arrows for manual carousel control
- README modal with lazy-loaded `marked` markdown rendering
- Skeleton loading state with animated pulse placeholders
- Language color indicators on project cards
- Star count and relative time display on project cards
- Topic tags (top 3) on project cards
- "Live from GitHub" / "Cached" status indicator
- `data-filter-text` attribute on showcase cards for enhanced filtering
- `prefers-reduced-motion` support (disables auto-rotation and transitions)
- ARIA labels and keyboard navigation for carousel controls
- Responsive carousel: 4 cards desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile

### Changed
- Replaced static Projects section with dynamic ProjectShowcase component
- Updated CommandBar filter to use `data-filter-text` attribute when available
- Added `marked` as project dependency for README markdown rendering
- Added GitHub config (`github.username`) to site.json

## Rules
- Do NOT add Co-Authored-By to git commits
- No instances of the word 'blog'
